TOP-001.text: Fits true to size and the fabric is thick enough that it doesn't feel see-through. Great for the office.
Ironing this is a breeze compared to other oxfords I've owned. Holds its shape well after washing.
Sleeves run slightly long on me, but otherwise a great classic shirt for the price.
The collar keeps its structure even without starch. Very happy with this purchase.

DRS-001.text: This dress is so flattering on every body type — the wrap tie lets you adjust the fit perfectly.
Wore this to a beach wedding and got so many compliments. The fabric doesn't wrinkle easily either.
Runs slightly large, I'd recommend sizing down if you're between sizes.
The color is even more beautiful in person. Feels like a much more expensive dress than it is.
Only downside is it needs to be dry cleaned, but the quality justifies it.

SHO-001.text: These boots have held up through an entire rainy season with minimal care. Excellent leather quality.
Took about a week to break in but now they're the most comfortable boots I own.
Sizing is accurate, I ordered my usual size and they fit perfectly right out of the box.
The elastic side panels have started to loosen slightly after 6 months of regular wear.

DRS-002.text: The perfect little black dress — flattering fit and the fabric has a subtle shine that photographs beautifully.
I've worn this to three different events now and it never disappoints.
Zipper felt a bit delicate, I'd handle it carefully when dressing.
True to size and the length hits right at the knee, very versatile for both formal and semi-formal events.

SHO-004.text: Incredibly comfortable right out of the box, no break-in period needed at all.
The white leather shows scuffs fairly easily, but a quick wipe down keeps them looking fresh.
Goes with literally everything in my closet — best sneaker purchase I've made.
Slightly narrow fit, ordered a half size up and it worked out well.
